/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -g -pthread -s ALLOW_BLOCKING_ON_MAIN_THREAD=1 -s PTHREAD_POOL_SIZE=8 -g -s NO_EXIT_RUNTIME=1 -s STANDALONE_WASM=0 --embed-file /home/micha/COP3530/projects/P2/TraceAndPace/frontend/src/assets@/assets --bind --emit-tsd TraceAndPace.d.mts CMakeFiles/TraceAndPace.dir/backend/main.cpp.o -o /home/micha/COP3530/projects/P2/TraceAndPace/frontend/src/wasm/TraceAndPace.mjs
